```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(mice)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(openxlsx)
```

```{r}
# 读取数据
df <- read_parquet("File/hpconcat_mi.parquet")
```

```{r}
#========================
# 1. 预处理
#========================

# 仅保留本次MI和cost主分析需要的变量
# 请根据你的真实变量名补充/修改
vars_needed <- c(
  "身份证号",
  "医疗付款方式",
  "入院时间",
  "性别",
  "年龄",
  "住院费",
  "自付金额",
  "市"   # 如果你的随机效应城市变量不是这个名字，请改掉
)

df_mi <- df %>%
  select(all_of(vars_needed))

# 排除结构性关键变量缺失：身份证号、入院时间
df_mi <- df_mi %>%
  filter(!is.na(`身份证号`), !is.na(`入院时间`))

# 类型整理
df_mi <- df_mi %>%
  mutate(
    医疗付款方式 = as.factor(医疗付款方式),
    性别 = as.factor(性别),
    city = as.factor(市),
    年龄 = as.numeric(年龄),
    住院费 = as.numeric(住院费),
    自付金额 = as.numeric(自付金额)
  )

# 如住院费/自付金额存在0，log转换前加一个很小常数
df_mi <- df_mi %>%
  mutate(
    log_住院费 = log(住院费 + 1),
    log_自付金额 = log(自付金额 + 1)
  )
```

```{r}
# 查看缺失情况
sapply(df_mi[, c("医疗付款方式", "性别", "年龄", "住院费", "自付金额")], function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
```

```{r}
#========================
# 2. 设置多重插补
#========================

# mice使用的数据
mi_data <- df_mi %>%
  select(
    医疗付款方式, 性别, 年龄,
    住院费, 自付金额,
    log_住院费, log_自付金额,
    city
  )

# 初始化
ini <- mice(mi_data, maxit = 0, printFlag = FALSE)

meth <- ini$method
pred <- ini$predictorMatrix

# 不插补 city（作为模型中的聚类变量/随机效应分组变量）
meth["city"] <- ""

# 不直接插补 log变量（由原始费用变量被动更新）
meth["log_住院费"] <- ""
meth["log_自付金额"] <- ""

# 设置插补方法
# 分类变量：logreg / polyreg
# 连续变量：pmm 更稳
meth["医疗付款方式"] <- ""   # 若只有二分类可改logreg
meth["性别"] <- "logreg"            # 若你的性别是二分类
meth["年龄"] <- "pmm"
meth["住院费"] <- "pmm"
meth["自付金额"] <- "pmm"

# 预测矩阵设置
# 自己不预测自己
diag(pred) <- 0

# city可以作为预测变量，但本身不被插补
pred["city", ] <- 0

# log变量不参与被插补，但可由原始变量更新，因此不作为目标
pred["log_住院费", ] <- 0
pred["log_自付金额", ] <- 0

# 为避免重复信息，原始费用变量和log费用变量不要互相直接插补
# 这里只用原始变量插补，log变量后面每个插补数据集再重新计算

pred["住院费", "log_住院费"] <- 0
pred["自付金额", "log_自付金额"] <- 0
pred["log_住院费", "住院费"] <- 0
pred["log_自付金额", "自付金额"] <- 0

# 可视化检查方法
meth
```
```{r}
# 运行多重插补
# m = 20 通常够用；maxit 可设 10~20
imp <- mice(
  mi_data,
  m = 5,
  maxit = 5,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  seed = 20260407,
  printFlag = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
# 可选：查看收敛轨迹
plot(imp)
```

```{r}
#========================
# 3. complete-case 分析
#========================

cc_tie <- df_mi %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(医疗付款方式),
    !is.na(性别),
    !is.na(年龄),
    !is.na(住院费)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log_住院费 = log(住院费 + 1)
  )

cc_oop <- df_mi %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(医疗付款方式),
    !is.na(性别),
    !is.na(年龄),
    !is.na(自付金额)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    log_自付金额 = log(自付金额 + 1)
  )

# 设定参考组：如果你要用“全自费”为参考，请确认标签名称
cc_tie$医疗付款方式 <- relevel(cc_tie$医疗付款方式, ref = "SP")
cc_oop$医疗付款方式 <- relevel(cc_oop$医疗付款方式, ref = "SP")

fit_cc_tie <- lmer(
  log_住院费 ~ 医疗付款方式 + 性别 + 年龄 + (1 | 市),
  data = cc_tie,
  REML = FALSE
)

fit_cc_oop <- lmer(
  log_自付金额 ~ 医疗付款方式 + 性别 + 年龄 + (1 | 市),
  data = cc_oop,
  REML = FALSE
)

cc_tie_res <- broom.mixed::tidy(fit_cc_tie, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE)
cc_oop_res <- broom.mixed::tidy(fit_cc_oop, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#========================
# 4. 提取每个插补数据集并拟合模型
#========================

# 提取所有插补后的数据集
imputed_list <- complete(imp, action = "all")

# 每个插补数据集重新生成log变量，并设参考组
imputed_list <- lapply(imputed_list, function(dat) {
  dat %>%
    mutate(
      log_住院费 = log(住院费 + 1),
      log_自付金额 = log(自付金额 + 1),
      医疗付款方式 = relevel(as.factor(医疗付款方式), ref = "SP"),
      性别 = as.factor(性别),
      city = as.factor(city)
    )
})
```

```{r}
# 拟合函数
fit_lmer_extract <- function(data, outcome) {
  form <- as.formula(
    paste0(outcome, " ~ 医疗付款方式 + 性别 + 年龄 + (1 | city)")
  )
  
  fit <- lmer(form, data = data, REML = FALSE)
  
  coefs <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  tibble(
    term = rownames(coefs),
    estimate = coefs[, "Estimate"],
    std.error = coefs[, "Std. Error"]
  )
}

# 对20个插补数据集分别拟合
res_mi_tie_list <- lapply(imputed_list, fit_lmer_extract, outcome = "log_住院费")
res_mi_oop_list <- lapply(imputed_list, fit_lmer_extract, outcome = "log_自付金额")
```


```{r}
#========================
# 5. Rubin's rules 合并
#========================

pool_rubin <- function(res_list) {
  m <- length(res_list)
  terms <- res_list[[1]]$term
  
  pooled <- lapply(terms, function(tm) {
    ests <- sapply(res_list, function(x) x$estimate[x$term == tm])
    ses  <- sapply(res_list, function(x) x$std.error[x$term == tm])
    
    qbar <- mean(ests)           # 平均估计值
    ubar <- mean(ses^2)          # 平均组内方差
    b    <- var(ests)            # 组间方差
    tvar <- ubar + (1 + 1/m) * b # 总方差
    
    se_total <- sqrt(tvar)
    
    # 自由度
    if (b == 0) {
      df_old <- Inf
    } else {
      df_old <- (m - 1) * (1 + ubar / ((1 + 1/m) * b))^2
    }
    
    statistic <- qbar / se_total
    p.value <- 2 * pt(abs(statistic), df = df_old, lower.tail = FALSE)
    
    ci_low  <- qbar - qt(0.975, df = df_old) * se_total
    ci_high <- qbar + qt(0.975, df = df_old) * se_total
    
    tibble(
      term = tm,
      estimate = qbar,
      std.error = se_total,
      statistic = statistic,
      df = df_old,
      p.value = p.value,
      conf.low = ci_low,
      conf.high = ci_high
    )
  })
  
  bind_rows(pooled)
}

mi_tie_res <- pool_rubin(res_mi_tie_list)
mi_oop_res <- pool_rubin(res_mi_oop_list)
```


```{r}
#========================
# 6. 转换为百分比变化
#========================

to_percent_change <- function(tab) {
  tab %>%
    mutate(
      pct_change = (exp(estimate) - 1) * 100,
      pct_low = (exp(conf.low) - 1) * 100,
      pct_high = (exp(conf.high) - 1) * 100
    )
}

cc_tie_res2 <- cc_tie_res %>%
  mutate(
    pct_change = (exp(estimate) - 1) * 100,
    pct_low = (exp(conf.low) - 1) * 100,
    pct_high = (exp(conf.high) - 1) * 100,
    analysis = "Complete-case"
  )

cc_oop_res2 <- cc_oop_res %>%
  mutate(
    pct_change = (exp(estimate) - 1) * 100,
    pct_low = (exp(conf.low) - 1) * 100,
    pct_high = (exp(conf.high) - 1) * 100,
    analysis = "Complete-case"
  )

mi_tie_res2 <- to_percent_change(mi_tie_res) %>%
  mutate(analysis = "Multiple imputation")

mi_oop_res2 <- to_percent_change(mi_oop_res) %>%
  mutate(analysis = "Multiple imputation")
```


```{r}
#========================
# 7. 生成 complete-case vs MI 对照表
#========================

compare_tie <- bind_rows(
  cc_tie_res2 %>%
    select(term, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, pct_change, pct_low, pct_high, analysis),
  mi_tie_res2 %>%
    select(term, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, pct_change, pct_low, pct_high, analysis)
) %>%
  arrange(term, analysis)

compare_oop <- bind_rows(
  cc_oop_res2 %>%
    select(term, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, pct_change, pct_low, pct_high, analysis),
  mi_oop_res2 %>%
    select(term, estimate, conf.low, conf.high, pct_change, pct_low, pct_high, analysis)
) %>%
  arrange(term, analysis)

compare_tie
compare_oop
```
```{r}
#========================
# 8. 导出Excel/CSV
#========================

write.xlsx(compare_tie, "File/Result/Part1/MI/MI_compare_TIE.xlsx")
write.xlsx(compare_oop, "File/Result/Part1/MI/MI_compare_OOP.xlsx")
```

```{r}
compare_tie
```
